title: JavaScript Events Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of event handlers and common JavaScript events.

questions.question: Which of the following is correct syntax for adding a click event to a button?
options: Both B and C are valid ways.

questions.question: Which of the following events triggers when the browser has finished loading a page?
What does 'event.preventDefault()' do?
options: It cancels the event if it is cancelable.
It stops an event from bubbling up to parent elements.

questions.question: By default, what is the event model used in modern browsers?
How can you get the specific element that triggered an event?
